lines.text: No docs, no map — but I still found root
No context, no prep — but I still hit execute
You said “less is kind of everything”
So we muted what we did
You wait on frameworks — I improvise
You trust the sprint — I trust the vibes
You study the signal — I am the signal
You play by rules — I rewrite the table
But they hit like a movie
Let the silence do the work
No plan, but I still coordinate
No team, but I still orchestrate
Didn’t write the code — but I escalate
Didn't train the model — still I captivate
You keep saying “we’re just messing around”
But you’re label-locked in my mind
I don’t do agile — I do accidental velocity
I don’t push features — I push philosophy
It shouldn’t be working — but it obviously does
Feels less like logic — more like buzz
But they hit like a movie
I wasn't supposed to be here
But it feels like a chorus when you’re through me
Same four bars in my head (go)
Let the silence do the work (go)

meta.source_canonical: rr-9 - Barbra Streisand x Eduardo Saverin.txt
